---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.0.0]
- **npm Version**: [e.g. 9.0.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox] (if applicable)

## 📋 Configuration

- **Gemini API Key**: [Configured/Not Configured]
- **WordPress URL**: [e.g. https://mysite.com]
- **WordPress User Role**: [e.g. Editor, Author]
- **Hosting Platform**: [e.g. Render, Heroku, Local]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Debug Information

Run these commands and include the output:

```bash
# Test Gemini AI
npm run test-gemini

# Test WordPress authentication
npm run test-auth

# Test webhook endpoints
npm run test-webhook
```

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided all required information
- [ ] I have tested with the latest version
- [ ] I have included debug information
- [ ] I have checked the documentation
